top_signals.title: Rising Dollar Swings Threaten to Dent Resilient Carry Trades
top_signals.summary: Rising dollar volatility is endangering a currency-trading strategy that had been a steady winner in recent months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italian coffee giant Lavazza launches single-serve tablets to make espresso in the U.S.
top_signals.summary: With Tablì, Lavazza is betting that sustainability is still a top consideration for many coffee drinkers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Public asked to help select UK wildlife to appear on new banknote series
top_signals.summary: The public are being asked to give their views on a selection of wildlife, native to the UK, that will appear on the next series of banknotes in a consultation launched today.

top_signals.title: Citrini says Hyperliquid’s legitimate cash flow, token buyback strategy make for ‘compelling’ investment
top_signals.summary: "By some measures, Hyperliquid repurchases have accounted for nearly half of all token-buyback activity across" crypto in 2025, said Citrini.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
